short_summary: Iran deal shifts US focus signals
rationale: Trump's claimed Iran settlement and cancellation of strikes signals US diplomatic bandwidth shifting toward Middle East, raising uncertainty about sustained Western focus on Ukraine aid.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', cancels strikes
top_events.summary: US diplomatic energy redirected toward Iran deal; raises concern in Ukraine about whether Western attention and aid commitments remain firm.

top_events.title: Vance says Netanyahu 'has got some things wrong'
top_events.summary: US-Israel friction signals Trump administration willing to diverge from allies; ambiguous signal for Ukraine regarding US reliability as a partner.

top_events.title: Active war with Russia — ongoing strikes and front
top_events.summary: No new qualitative escalation reported this cycle; war continues at established baseline.
